➕ Add Release Entry
Follow steps 1–10 in order
1 🏢 Client No
Client number must be 4-6 digits
⚠️
Error History Found
Click to review & acknowledge before processing
View →
2 🔢 Transaction Number
Must be 8 digits starting with 6,7,8 or 4
⚠️ Duplicate — this Transaction Number already exists in Release!
3 📅 Transaction Created
📋 Paste Outlook date — auto-normalised to dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS
4 ⏰ ETA
Used to calculate TAT — paste from NCC
5 🏷️ Client Name & Team
7 📦 Lines & Mode
Required for Ocean / Air / Rail modes
9 📋 Status
⏱️ Submitted time auto-captures on status select
🔖 Profile Code
Select Yes if profile code applies to this transaction
10 👤 User Name
⏱️ Duration & TAT auto-calculate on select
🚛 Truck TAT Analytics (auto-calculated)
💬 Comments
